accessibility.plain_language_summary: Longitudinal WHOOP and Strava records corroborate sustained skating activity across time; the accepted repeated protocol remains the stronger controlled comparison.
accessibility.screen_reader_summary: Monthly time series show activity frequency and distance for walking, Mall skating, PT skating, and FNS/SNS skating. Missing months are omitted rather than plotted as zero.

approved_values.late_strava_binding: Pending weekly Strava links are a coverage state, not evidence of data loss.

evidence_scope: Aggregate WHOOP and Strava longitudinal context; not a session-HRV substitution.
limitations: Wearables estimate physiologic, autonomic, MSK, movement, impact, and transport burden. They do not directly measure pain. Results are within-person evidence, not clinical proof, diagnosis, causation, universal proof, or legal proof.
plain_language_finding: Longitudinal WHOOP and Strava records corroborate sustained skating activity across time; the accepted repeated protocol remains the stronger controlled comparison.
summary: Longitudinal WHOOP and Strava records corroborate sustained skating activity across time; the accepted repeated protocol remains the stronger controlled comparison.
title: Longitudinal activity context
